description_long: This is a KRK Systems Classic 5 studio monitor speaker, featuring a robust black rectangular enclosure with slightly rounded edges. The front face displays a prominent yellow cone woofer and a smaller black tweeter above it, both set within a recessed baffle. The brand logo is visible on the upper left of the front panel, adding a touch of professional branding. The rear panel is equipped with various input ports, adjustment knobs for high-frequency and volume control, and a power switch, all clearly labeled for user convenience. The sides and top are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design typical of professional audio equipment. This speaker is designed to be placed on a desktop or studio stand, providing high-fidelity sound output for audio production or playback.
description: A black KRK Systems Classic 5 studio monitor speaker with a yellow woofer, black tweeter, and rear control panel. The enclosure is sleek and professional, suitable for desktop or studio use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow woofer, black tweeter, and KRK logo on a smooth black face.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, smooth black surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing input ports, adjustment knobs, power switch, and the KRK Systems branding.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain, smooth black surface similar to the left side.
